speaker: [player]
text: Mawla — how do you actually feel about all of this?
She considers this. She takes a sip of her coffee.

speaker: Mawla
text: I think Scatha isn't real. I think Vermia knows Scatha isn't real. I think the whole thing is kind of a beautiful fiction that she built to make writing feel like it matters more.

speaker: Mawla
text: And I think — if you squint at it right — it does make writing feel like it matters more. So.

speaker: Vermia
text: That is the most heretical thing you've ever said and also the nicest.

speaker: Grubwin
text: I've been here two years and I've never heard you put it that way.

speaker: Mawla
text: New person asked. Felt like an honest answer kind of situation.

speaker: Dirtus
text: For the record I think Scatha IS real and I think my summoning plan is going to prove it.

speaker: Mawla
text: For the record I support your right to believe that.

speaker: Mawla
text: I don't think it'll work though.

speaker: Dirtus
text: I respect your doubt. It will make the success sweeter.
You think you might actually like everyone here. That's alarming given that you arrived twenty minutes ago, but here you are.
